records.m_Talk_ENG: That kid is stronger than we imagined.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That kid is stronger than we imagined.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That kid is stronger than we imagined.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's using her bare hands, but she's fighting neck and neck...
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's using her bare hands, but she's fighting neck and neck...
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's using her bare hands, but she's fighting neck and neck...

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, she's unable to deal any damage to it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, she's unable to deal any damage to it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, she's unable to deal any damage to it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At this rate...
records.m_Talk_DEU: At this rate...
records.m_Talk_FRA: At this rate...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not enough with just my bare hands...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not enough with just my bare hands...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not enough with just my bare hands...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mavka!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mavka!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mavka!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She can't move! I think she's broken again!
records.m_Talk_DEU: She can't move! I think she's broken again!
records.m_Talk_FRA: She can't move! I think she's broken again!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No! It's too dangerous to go alone!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No! It's too dangerous to go alone!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No! It's too dangerous to go alone!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then are you saying that I should watch her die?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then are you saying that I should watch her die?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then are you saying that I should watch her die?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I'll get the Kikimora's attention! You go save Mavka!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I'll get the Kikimora's attention! You go save Mavka!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I'll get the Kikimora's attention! You go save Mavka!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no time! Hurry!
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no time! Hurry!
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no time! Hurry!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mavka!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mavka!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mavka!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm all right. I don't fall that easily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm all right. I don't fall that easily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm all right. I don't fall that easily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But my fists can't land a critical hit on that thing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But my fists can't land a critical hit on that thing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But my fists can't land a critical hit on that thing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Critical hit... then...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Critical hit... then...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Critical hit... then...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sasha. There is a <color=#ffd34c>Repulsor Gun</color> equipped in my hand. I want you to fix it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sasha. There is a <color=#ffd34c>Repulsor Gun</color> equipped in my hand. I want you to fix it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sasha. There is a <color=#ffd34c>Repulsor Gun</color> equipped in my hand. I want you to fix it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: R-Repulsor Gun? What's that...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: R-Repulsor Gun? What's that...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: R-Repulsor Gun? What's that...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's... a weapon that shoots an energy beam out of my hand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's... a weapon that shoots an energy beam out of my hand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's... a weapon that shoots an energy beam out of my hand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've seen it appear in comics and cartoons!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've seen it appear in comics and cartoons!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've seen it appear in comics and cartoons!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you mean a weapon like that actually exists?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you mean a weapon like that actually exists?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you mean a weapon like that actually exists?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm on it! S-so...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm on it! S-so...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm on it! S-so...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Watch out!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Watch out!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Watch out!

records.m_Talk_ENG: KYAAH!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: KYAAH!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: KYAAH!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that was a close one... Thanks, Mavka!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that was a close one... Thanks, Mavka!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that was a close one... Thanks, Mavka!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you two all right?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you two all right?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you two all right?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-yeah! We're okay!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-yeah! We're okay!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-yeah! We're okay!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Look out! It's headed your way!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Look out! It's headed your way!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Look out! It's headed your way!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit! That bastard!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit! That bastard!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit! That bastard!

records.m_Talk_ENG: NO!
records.m_Talk_DEU: NO!
records.m_Talk_FRA: NO!

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>...</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>...</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>...</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what? It stopped moving!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what? It stopped moving!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what? It stopped moving!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was able to hit it because it stopped moving for a second.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was able to hit it because it stopped moving for a second.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was able to hit it because it stopped moving for a second.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought that C.O.s were unintelligent entities that ran rampant...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought that C.O.s were unintelligent entities that ran rampant...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought that C.O.s were unintelligent entities that ran rampant...

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-now! Give me your arm, quickly!
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-now! Give me your arm, quickly!
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-now! Give me your arm, quickly!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What the...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What the...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What the...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She had a weapon in her arm that can produce that much firepower...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She had a weapon in her arm that can produce that much firepower...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She had a weapon in her arm that can produce that much firepower...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not enough. I won't be able to kill it by firing from afar.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not enough. I won't be able to kill it by firing from afar.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not enough. I won't be able to kill it by firing from afar.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The only way... is to shoot it point-blank...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The only way... is to shoot it point-blank...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The only way... is to shoot it point-blank...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: M-Mavka!
records.m_Talk_DEU: M-Mavka!
records.m_Talk_FRA: M-Mavka!
